task_completion.description: Verify that a new item of type 'Video Recording' has been created in the library.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the right-hand metadata pane. The 'Item Type' field should display 'Video Recording', or there should be a video/film icon next to the item in the central list.

task_completion.description: Verify that the title is set to 'Hot Coffee'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right-hand metadata pane, the 'Title' field should contain exactly 'Hot Coffee'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the creator is added with the role 'Director' and the name 'Susan Saladoff'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right-hand metadata pane, the creator role dropdown/label should say 'Director' and the name fields should contain 'Saladoff' (Last) and 'Susan' (First).

task_completion.description: Verify that the date is set to '2011'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right-hand metadata pane, the 'Date' field should contain '2011'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the distributor is set to 'HBO Documentary Films'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right-hand metadata pane, the 'Distributor' (or 'Studio') field should contain 'HBO Documentary Films'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the running time is set to '86 min'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right-hand metadata pane, the 'Running Time' field should contain '86 min' or '86 minutes'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual reference management software (e.g., Zotero) GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the standard interface of a reference manager (like Zotero), not a text editor, terminal window, or mocked interface.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to add the reference.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing API calls, sqlite database modifications, or script executions to bypass manual GUI entry.

integrity.description: Ensure the item is actually saved in the library list, not just typed into a search bar or temporary text field.
integrity.visual_evidence: The central pane of the application should list 'Hot Coffee' as an entry in the library, confirming it was added and saved.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The reference must be a 'Video Recording'. Title: 'Hot Coffee'. Creator role: 'Director', Name: 'Susan Saladoff' (or 'Saladoff' as last name). Date: '2011'. Distributor (or Studio): 'HBO Documentary Films'. Running Time: '86 min' or '86 minutes'.
